title: Multi-Brand Gift Cards
description: What are the leading multi-brand gift card solutions in France that offer wide retail acceptance, digital and physical formats, and benefits for both individuals and businesses?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information on multi-brand gift card platforms in France that are widely accepted across diverse retail sectors (fashion, beauty, sports, home, etc.), available in both physical and digital forms, and used for personal gifting, employee rewards, or corporate loyalty programs. Relevance is determined by documents that describe the scope of partner retailers, usage flexibility (online/in-store), fiscal/social benefits, and target audiences (employees, consumers, businesses). Documents focused on single-brand cards (e.g., Decathlon, Bonobo) or non-gift-card services (e.g., purchase orders, outdoor gear retailers) are not relevant, even if they mention 'gift card' in passing.

title: Lamb Tajine Recipe
description: What is a traditional Moroccan lamb tajine recipe with vegetables and spices, including variations in ingredient quantities and cooking methods?
narrative: The user seeks authentic Moroccan lamb tajine recipes that feature lamb, vegetables (such as aubergine, courgette, potato, and tomato), olives, preserved lemon, and aromatic spices like ras el hanout, cumin, and saffron. Relevance is determined by detailed preparation steps, realistic ingredient proportions (not excessive spices or unrealistic quantities), and inclusion of vegetable components—excluding recipes that substitute lamb with other meats (e.g., 'lamb mice'), omit vegetables, or focus solely on dried fruits like prunes or dates. User feedback on adjustments (e.g., reducing spice or vegetable amounts) is valuable for assessing practicality and authenticity.

title: Lotus Elise Purchase
description: Find a reliable, low-mileage used Lotus Elise with verified history and fair market pricing in France.
narrative: The user is seeking a used Lotus Elise, a premium sports car, with specific criteria: low mileage (under 100,000 km), a verifiable vehicle history (e.g., via Histovec), and a price aligned with the market value (Argus). Relevance is determined by ads that explicitly list the Lotus Elise model, include detailed technical specs, mention low mileage and service history, and provide pricing information consistent with the Argus guide. Irrelevant results include general used car portals without model-specific details, car rental services, or technical specifications for unrelated models like the Peugeot 3008.

title: Veal Paupiettes Recipes
description: Find authentic, traditional French recipes for veal paupiettes with detailed preparation methods, stuffing options, and serving suggestions.
narrative: The user seeks reliable, culturally accurate recipes for veal paupiettes — a classic French dish involving thin veal escalopes rolled around a stuffing and slow-cooked in sauce. Relevance is determined by detailed step-by-step instructions, traditional ingredients (e.g., mushrooms, white wine, bouquet garni), historical context, and cooking tips such as avoiding overcooking or using proper flattening techniques. Recipes that focus on modern shortcuts, unrelated meats (e.g., chicken), or generic side dish advice without core preparation details are not relevant.

title: Car Sun Protection
description: What are the most effective methods and products to protect a car's interior and occupants from sun damage and heat when parked outdoors long-term?
narrative: The user seeks practical, actionable solutions to prevent sun-related damage to a vehicle parked outside, including protection of the interior (e.g., dashboards, seats, upholstery), reduction of cabin heat, and safeguarding occupants—especially children—from UV exposure. Relevance is determined by content that addresses physical barriers (e.g., sun visors, tinted films), preventive maintenance (e.g., shade, cleaning, rodent control), and product recommendations (e.g., electrostatic films, sprays) that directly mitigate sun and heat damage. Documents discussing general car washing, 3D printing, or unrelated sunscreen products are not relevant.

Documents that focus solely on children’s clothing, men’s wear, wood stoves, or retail logistics are not relevant, even if they mention Petit Bateau.

title: Renault Employee Cars

The user’s intent is to get a brand-new car at a collaborator price without being an employee — so only documents that facilitate this specific pathway are relevant.

title: War School Publications
description: What official publications and educational resources does the French School of War produce for military professionals and the public?
narrative: The user seeks authoritative, institutionally sanctioned materials produced by the French École de Guerre (School of War), including books, e-books, journals, or strategic studies aimed at military education and strategic thought. Relevant documents must originate from or be officially affiliated with the School of War’s editions or publishing arm, such as those hosted on ecoledeguerre.paris or linked to its academic mission. Relevance hinges on direct association with the School’s publications, editorial policies, or academic dissemination efforts, excluding third-party analyses, news reports, or unrelated military institutions like IRSEM unless explicitly tied to the School’s publishing activities.

title: Unemployment Option
description: What are the conditions and implications of exercising the right of option to switch from remaining unemployment benefits to a new, higher allowance based on recent employment?
narrative: The user is an unemployed individual who previously received unemployment benefits (ARE) and has since returned to work for at least six months in a higher-paying job. They are now unemployed again and want to understand whether they can bypass their remaining lower benefits and instead receive a new, larger allowance based on their most recent employment. They need clarity on the eligibility criteria—specifically the 30% increase threshold or daily allowance cap of €20—and the irreversible consequence of forfeiting remaining old rights. They are weighing the trade-off between a shorter but higher-paying benefit period versus a longer but lower one, and require authoritative guidance to make an informed decision before submitting a formal request to Pôle Emploi.

title: AXA Client Portal

narrative: Users need clear, authoritative guidance on accessing AXA’s official client portal—distinguishing between insurance and banking portals (axa.fr vs. axabanque.fr)—and resolving common login issues such as forgotten credentials, authentication errors, or phishing risks. title: Return-to-Work Bonus
description: What are the eligibility criteria and procedures for claiming a return-to-work bonus in France after resuming employment following a period of social assistance?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed, up-to-date information on whether they qualify for a return-to-work bonus after finding a job following receipt of RSA, SSA, or similar social benefits. They need clarity on the legal requirements—including minimum employment duration (e.g., 1 month for CDI holders vs. 4 months generally), required documentation (contract, pay slips), which agency to contact (CAF, Pôle Emploi, or General Council), and whether the bonus still exists given past reforms (e.g., abolition of PEP in 2016). Relevance is determined by documents that specify current eligibility rules, application processes, regional variations (e.g., APRE), and official sources confirming the bonus’s status post-2015. Irrelevant documents include those about oil fuel, general youth aid, or unemployment end-of-benefits lump sums, which do not address the specific return-to-work bonus mechanism.
